title: Mugm Overlay
description: Vanilla-style Minecraft pack inspired by Mugm and others, with credits included. Smooth visuals for SMP, PvP, and grinding.
body:
# Mugm Overlay
This texture pack gives Minecraft a vanilla-like, smooth, and clean look, perfect for SMP, PvP, and grinding. It was inspired by the YouTuber **Mugm**, and I created my own version using elements from **other packs**, with **full credits given** to their **creators**.
* This is all from **Mugm's** video; I tried my best to **recreate it fully**.

## Compatibility
* Tested on: 1.21.8 – 1.20.x (Main version: 1.21+)
* Other versions: not tested

## Requirements
* **No mods required**, this pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
* Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
* Low Shield From **[Low Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lowshield)**.
* Inspired by **[Mugm](https://www.youtube.com/@MugmV2)**.
